calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Petitioner Pilar Fontenot was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Malikai Christopher Maurice Hill.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Order dispensing with notice to the minor's biological father of the proposed name change was filed today, June 29, 2010.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Phillip Christopher Kai Hill.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
